creator: nbe@renzel.net
text:
Yeah, that thing generates a "bus error" as soon as you activate ultra speed. But I don't know how to fix that:

and compiling with any of the GCC compilers fails due to undefined references in the boost libs.

Maybe someone has any ideas...
